biography: From the fairways of Kurk Golf, Mikko made a singular competitive foray into the esteemed Hector Trophée, leaving a unique, albeit brief, mark on the tournament's narrative.

During his lone competitive journey, Mikko exhibited a focused dedication to the game. He approached each shot with careful consideration, a characteristic reflecting a player who prioritizes precision. Despite his earnest efforts, neither the coveted Hector Trophée for the winning pair nor the esteemed Victor Trophy for the top individual player were secured during his participation.

Although Mikko will not be among the competitors for the Hector Trophée 2026, he remains an active participant in other Hector events. His singular, yet memorable, involvement in the Trophée underscores a commitment to the spirit of competition and suggests a potential return to challenge for the titles that have, thus far, eluded him.
